title: aeschynomene leptophylla subsp. leptophylla
intro: Aeschynomene leptophylla subsp. leptophylla is a plant species belonging to the pea family, Fabaceae, and is commonly known as the 'Stickyleaf Pea' or 'Sensitive Plant'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Aeschynomene leptophylla subsp. leptophylla are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
